title: polygala rupestris subsp. rupestris
intro: Polygala rupestris subsp. rupestris, also known as Rock Joepyre or Rock Polygala, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Polygalaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Polygala rupestris subsp. rupestris are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
